org.flowable.cmmn.model.ReactivationRule

    Fields in org.flowable.cmmn.model declared as ReactivationRule
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected ReactivationRule
    ReactivateEventListener.defaultReactivationRule
    The optional, default reactivation rule to be considered, if a plan item does not specify an explicit one, if this one is not provided either, such a plan item will be ignored for reactivation.
    protected ReactivationRule
    PlanItemControl.reactivationRule
